{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212122026B3C4418981A4F0CAF2B"}"},"total":329},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606904349155246873","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错了，男主表现出的三观很好，几乎没有缺点，日常也写的很不错，不过现在几乎人均老书虫了，这种多女主但不吃肉的在这种环境下几乎没人看了，我只能说都看多女了，我能是什么正经人[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771123553,"group_id":"7587006387876547646","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看书我有三不看，女频，女尊，末世，因为这几种主角，太离谱了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8/T3K1myifZqv9+Fr6iJrufat/gub5EbgkHDpQQFFBk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/53b7f6a516fe4c97a72ebe5a685d0c58~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616310&x-signature=nofMkNSoacfnmBkh32rD82Sp4ns%3D","user_id":"2307208401658408","user_name":"•᷄ࡇ•᷅是"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2307208401658408","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587006387876547646","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+多女主+病娇+女总裁+校花+恋爱脑+双胞胎+影后+......】

砰的一下，以为是自己遇到了光，实际上是负距离接触了大运车大灯的叶临渊，成功穿越到了一个集合了各种虐文的女频虐文世界。
现在的他，是真假少爷文里面被抱错的假少爷，是虐夫一时爽，追夫火葬场里面千亿高冷女总裁的归国白月光，是替身文里的黑道千金从小喜欢到大的小太阳，是校园舔狗文里面被表白九十九次的高冷校花甘愿当舔狗的男神，是影后求而不得的竹马......
为了逃脱自己是主角的垫脚石的命运，叶临渊果断抛弃一切跑路去国外，直到获得了获得了简单粗暴的金手指！
系统在手，天下我有，你们是男主，那么我叶临渊便是天命大男主！
只是回来之后，他发现有些不对了，貌似自己不用当什么天命大男主，当个反派男二就可以当得很爽啊。
没事逗逗真假少爷文里被接回家的真千金，虐一虐追夫文里的懦弱的龟龟男主，和小跟班黑道千金撒撒糖气一气她的追求者，让高冷校花的头号舔狗眼泪汪汪，......
所以说，在白月光面前，除了死了的白月光，就算是自带主角光环的男主角都得往边上靠！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e8029f783d93e392992dda583d0049f3","author":"彩票中奖就辞职第二代","author_id":"","book_id":"7587006387876547646","book_name":"反派男二不作妖，就是完美白月光","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7587006425776259646","read_count":"84441","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"640217"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"269","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,多女主,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e3177cd135b458e325c31ad3bfd5a5d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283322&x-signature=oXk1cBXsaR0AUu4O4ddF%2B29Ojtk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3419906801678748","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"39"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212122026B3C4418981A4F0CAF2B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":35,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3932,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":16958},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604926861651755838","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"emmm怎么说呢，我首先声明一点我不是水军就纯路人一个，我感觉这个剧情还可以啊我都通宵看到了凌晨4点多，并没有那些打低分说的那样该吃肉就吃肉，也没有当太监，我唯一不理解的事情就是虽然剧情套路俗套但评分至少也要在7.9～8.5之间，也没有很大的毒点都是剧情需要安排的，要不然一部小说怎么写下去。（后面来的兄弟如果看见我这条评论可以先看一下不用在意他们评论，可以试一下写的还不错）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770666137,"group_id":"7587006387876547646","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"打发时间，娱乐不喜勿喷哦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx4AbwLV6oN9+BjKLIMgiVrohum15v/Jk4Eh8ZZxEqyv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4f97ed3deb814c97b37a14bfa10294f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617086&x-signature=w5vvjQ5YWwiohH1VZBtigq2fWNg%3D","user_id":"1618094611764557","user_name":"饰时"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1618094611764557","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587006387876547646","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+多女主+病娇+女总裁+校花+恋爱脑+双胞胎+影后+......】
